# Repository Copilot Instructions

Use specialized custom agents for planning, architecture, implementation, review, and testing.

Primary routing rules are defined in:

- `.github/instructions/agent-routing.instructions.md`

When working in this repository:

1. Start multi-step work with planning/architecture agents.
2. Route language/framework-specific work to domain reviewers.
3. Run focused review and test-strategy passes before finalizing.
4. Keep agent delegation minimal and purpose-driven.
